scripts.lint: yarn lint:prettier && yarn lint:ng && yarn lint:node && yarn lint:playwright:api && yarn lint:playwright:integration && yarn lint:playwright:e2e && yarn lint:playwright:architecture && yarn lint:reporting:scripts
scripts.lint:prettier: prettier -c .prettierrc package.json playwright.config.ts playwright.e2e.config.ts playwright-nightly.config.ts playwright.integration.config.ts playwright-reporting.ts
scripts.lint:prettier:fix: prettier -w .prettierrc package.json playwright.config.ts playwright.e2e.config.ts playwright-nightly.config.ts playwright.integration.config.ts playwright-reporting.ts
scripts.lint:reporting:scripts: node --check scripts/build-playwright-evidence-dashboard.js && node --check scripts/copy-odhin-report.js && node --check scripts/ensure-load-profile-report.js && node --check scripts/ensure-odhin-report.js && node --check scripts/playwright-load-event.js && node --check scripts/playwright-load-monitor.js && node --check scripts/run-playwright-a11y.js && node --check scripts/verify-playwright-browsers.js && node --check playwright_tests_new/common/reporters/odhin-adaptive.reporter.cjs && node --check playwright_tests_new/common/reporters/odhin-progress.reporter.cjs && node --check playwright_tests_new/common/reporters/odhin-report-enhancer.cjs
scripts.pre-push: yarn lint && ng build --configuration production && ng test rpx-xui-manage-organisations --code-coverage
scripts.publish-pact: NODE_PATH=. LOG_LEVEL=error mocha -r ts-node/register api/test/pact/publish/*.ts --timeout 15000 --reporter spec
scripts.test:a11y: sh -c 'if [ "${RUN_PLAYWRIGHT_A11Y:-}" = "true" ]; then yarn test:a11y:playwright "$@"; else echo "Skipping Playwright a11y in this stage; deployed CNP/nightly stages call yarn test:a11y:playwright directly. Set RUN_PLAYWRIGHT_A11Y=true to execute this alias."; fi' --
scripts.test:can-i-deploy:consumer: export VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) && SSL_CERT_FILE=api/test/pact/cer/ca-bundle.crt pact-broker can-i-deploy --pacticipant 'xui_manageOrg' --version ${VERSION} --broker-base-url https://pact-broker.platform.hmcts.net
scripts.test:crossbrowser: yarn test:setup:playwright-install-all && yarn test:setup:playwright-verify-all && yarn test:crossbrowser:profile
scripts.test:crossbrowser:profile: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.js --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-E2E cross-browser}" -- yarn test:crossbrowser:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:crossbrowser:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/playwright-e2e-junit.xml}" npx playwright test -c playwright-nightly.config.ts "$@"' --
scripts.test:functional: echo 'CNP functionalTest hook is intentionally satisfied by Playwright lanes in Jenkinsfile_CNP' && exit 0
scripts.test:fullfunctional: echo 'CNP fullFunctionalTest hook is intentionally satisfied by Playwright lanes in Jenkinsfile_CNP/Jenkinsfile_nightly' && exit 0
scripts.test:smoke: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; SMOKE_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR="${PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR:-test-results/playwright-smoke}"; SMOKE_HTML_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-smoke/html-report}"; SMOKE_REPORT_FOLDER="${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER:-functional-output/tests/playwright-smoke/odhin-report}"; mkdir -p "$SMOKE_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR" "$SMOKE_HTML_OUTPUT" "$SMOKE_REPORT_FOLDER"; PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR="$SMOKE_TEST_OUTPUT_DIR" PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OUTPUT="$SMOKE_HTML_OUTPUT" PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-smoke/playwright-smoke-junit.xml}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER="$SMOKE_REPORT_FOLDER" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME="${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME:-xui-playwright-smoke.html}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_PROJECT="${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_PROJECT:-RPX XUI Manage Organisations - Smoke}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_TITLE="${PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_TITLE:-RPX XUI Manage Organisations Playwright Smoke}" npx playwright test --project=smoke "$@"' --
scripts.test:api:pw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.js --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-API}" -- yarn test:api:pw:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:api:pw:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; rm -rf functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report functional-output/tests/api_functional/odhin-report; if [ "${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_INSTALL}" != "true" ]; then yarn playwright install chromium; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-api/html-report}" PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-api/playwright-api-junit.xml}" PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_INDEX_FILENAME=xui-mo-playwright-api.html npx playwright test "$@" --project=node-api; status=$?; node ./scripts/copy-odhin-report.js; exit $status' --
scripts.test:playwrightE2E: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.js --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-E2E}" -- yarn test:playwrightE2E:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:playwrightE2E:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if [ "${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_INSTALL}" != "true" ]; then yarn playwright install chromium; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-e2e/playwright-e2e-junit.xml}" npx playwright test --config=playwright.e2e.config.ts "$@"' --
scripts.test:playwright:integration: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT=${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration/odhin-report/load-profile} node scripts/playwright-load-monitor.js --report-folder functional-output/tests/playwright-integration/odhin-report --label "${PW_LOAD_PROFILE_LABEL:-Integration}" -- yarn test:playwright:integration:raw "$@"' --
scripts.test:playwright:integration:raw: sh -c 'if [ "${1:-}" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if [ "${PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_INSTALL}" != "true" ]; then yarn playwright install chromium; fi; PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT="${PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT:-functional-output/tests/playwright-integration/playwright-integration-junit.xml}" npx playwright test --config=playwright.integration.config.ts "$@"' --
scripts.test-pact: NODE_PATH=. NODE_ENV=pacttesting LOG_LEVEL=info mocha --timeout 10000 -r ts-node/register api/test/pact/pact-tests/**/*.spec.ts
